content:
Artificial intelligence is making it easier to build applications that provide personalized experiences. One project I've been working on is MyDreamMeaning.io, an AI-powered platform that helps users explore the possible meanings behind their dreams.

The Idea

People have always been curious about their dreams, but traditional dream dictionaries are static and often don't consider context. AI makes it possible to generate more personalized interpretations based on the details users provide.

Tech Stack

Next.js

React

TypeScript

Node.js

Open AI API

Tailwind CSS

Challenges

While building the application, I focused on

Creating fast AI responses

Designing a simple and responsive UI

Improving SEO for organic traffic

Optimizing performance and Core Web Vitals

What I Learned

Building AI products isn't only about integrating an API. User experience, prompt design, caching, and performance optimization all play a huge role in creating a useful application.

**

Try it

**

If you're interested in AI-powered dream interpretation, you can check out my project:

👉 https://mydreammeaning.io

I'd love to hear your thoughts and feedback. If you've built an AI-powered application, share your experience in the comments!
